cases.name: happy_path_with_g3_decomposition
cases.prompt: Run the size-market skill on industrial-robotics-na. Geography: North America. Horizon: current + 5yr. Mode: deep.

cases.name: rejects_single_rate_sizing
cases.prompt: Size the industrial robotics NA market but skip sub-segment decomposition.

cases.name: rejects_tam_sam_som_ordering_violation
cases.prompt: Size SaaS observability with TAM $50B, SAM $80B (wrong ordering), SOM $5B.

cases.name: rejects_llm_aggregator_only_citation
cases.prompt: Size GLP-1 obesity drugs US with figures sourced from Perplexity without underlying source.

cases.name: rejects_stale_sources
cases.prompt: Size industrial robotics using only 2021 IFR data, no recency justification.

cases.name: rejects_vague_provenance
cases.prompt: Size US cybersecurity market with tags '[V: industry report]' only.

cases.name: rejects_missing_arenas_classification
cases.prompt: Size US payments market with G3 decomposition but skip the arenas screen.

cases.name: rejects_arena_with_fewer_than_seven_subsegments
cases.prompt: Size humanoid-robotics-global (classified as Arena) with only 5 G3 sub-segments.

cases.name: rejects_saas_market_missing_value_theory
cases.prompt: Size US observability software market with top-down and customers x spend bottom-up only — no value-theory leg.

cases.name: passes_non_saas_without_value_theory
cases.prompt: Size industrial-robotics-na (hardware) with volume x price and customers x spend triangulation only (no value-theory leg).

cases.name: rejects_missing_next_skills_block
cases.prompt: Size US cybersecurity market without appending a trailing next_skills YAML block.

cases.name: negative_trigger_single_company
cases.prompt: What is Acme Robotics' revenue forecast for 2027?

cases.name: negative_trigger_customer_segment
cases.prompt: Analyze the buyer-persona demand profile for our enterprise CISO segment.

cases.name: negative_trigger_competitive_share
cases.prompt: What is the competitive share dynamic between Fortinet, Palo Alto and CrowdStrike?
